title: Blight
description: A industrial and decay themed decor mod, inspired by the mod Befoul by Luxintrus.
body:
#      -BLIGHT-

## **UNDERGOING A FULL REWORK AND WILL BE RELEASED FOR NEOFORGE 1.21.1**

A part of the world that decays and rots in the forgotten lands, life form which corrupts and mutates over time. Blight is an industrial/decay-themed decor mod inspired by the mod befoul by Luxintrus.

This mod adds various  decorations and utils related to the theme (i.e. rot, decay, corruption), for example we have:
- ◼️ Blackened Iron (new material required to craft all newly added blocks)
- 🏭 Mesh blocks, stairs, and flooring (Grate like blocks, industrial looking blocks) 
- 💡 Black lanterns (new lantern blocks)
- 🔥 Burnt Grass (A grass type block obtained after extinguishing fire on top of a grass block)

## Aim

This mod aims in adding various decoration blocks and an intersting way of obtaining them. As most of the decor or furniture mods do is just adding some sofas and lamps (mainly) which are just crafted using vanilla blocks, This mod in other hand adds new ores and materials to play with, like the Blackened iron, which is obtained by putting iron into a blast furnace and wich is also an root material for most of the blocks in the game right now. Adding decorational and furniture blocks which make an decayed, rotten, and an industrial environment, while making an interesting experience obtaining them.



<details>
<summary>More project info</summary>

This mod is WIP and made using MCreator, expected bugs can occur. This mod will be remade from scratch using manual scripting and will be added with interesting features soon.

</details>
